title: Verify tests pass and test vectors match Rust <-> C implementations
description: Run cargo test across crates. Ensure test/vectors/ JSONs are used by both Rust and C (or Python). Fix any mismatches in output for schnorr48, SCHC rules, CoAP/OSCORE packets etc. Update any related files.
close_reason: Tests verified passing; Rust <-> C vector parity confirmed for schnorr48/link_frame/schc/oscore/rpl via shared JSON fixtures and interop oracles; Cargo.lock updated for rpl dep; no remaining mismatches found.
